user.title: Connect to LazyWait
user.description: Enter the pairing code shown in your LazyWait dashboard under Integrations → Home Assistant → Connect. The code is valid for about 10 minutes.

reauth_confirm.title: Re-pair with LazyWait
reauth_confirm.description: Your LazyWait connection was reset (the token was rotated or revoked). Open the LazyWait dashboard, generate a new pairing code, and enter it here.

error.code_invalid: That pairing code is not valid. Check it and try again.
error.code_expired: That pairing code has expired. Generate a new one in the LazyWait dashboard.
error.code_used: That pairing code has already been used. Generate a new one in the LazyWait dashboard.
error.branch_mismatch: That code pairs a different branch. Use a code generated for this branch.
error.cannot_connect: Could not reach LazyWait. Check the cloud URL and your internet connection.

abort.already_configured: This LazyWait branch is already connected to Home Assistant.
